/**
 * patterns.java — Patrones de referencia para el agente backend-developer (Spring Boot).
 * Este archivo NO se compila. Es referencia para los agentes.
 *
 * Todos los patrones están envueltos en una clase contenedora para evitar
 * errores de sintaxis en IDEs que intenten parsear el archivo.
 */

// — Imports de referencia (los agentes deben incluir solo los necesarios) —
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import jakarta.validation.constraints.*;

import org.springframework.amqp.rabbit.annotation.RabbitListener;
import org.springframework.amqp.rabbit.core.RabbitTemplate;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.CreatedDate;
import org.springframework.data.annotation.LastModifiedDate;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.support.AuditingEntityListener;
import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;HttpStatus
import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;

@SuppressWarnings("all")
class Patterns {

    // =============================================
    // 1. ENTITY — Entidad JPA
    // =============================================
    @Entity
    @Table(name = "features")
    @EntityListeners(AuditingEntityListener.class)
    static class Feature {

        @Id
        @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
        private Long id;

        @Column(nullable = false, length = 100)
        private String name;

        @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
        @Column(name = "contract_type", nullable = false)
        private ContractType contractType;

        @Column(name = "gross_salary", nullable = false, precision = 10, scale = 2)
        private BigDecimal grossSalary;

        @CreatedDate
        @Column(name = "created_at", nullable = false, updatable = false)
        private LocalDateTime createdAt;

        @LastModifiedDate
        @Column(name = "updated_at", nullable = false)
        private LocalDateTime updatedAt;

        // constructor, getters, setters
    }

    // =============================================
    // 2. DTO — Request con Bean Validation
    // =============================================
    static class FeatureRequest {

        @NotBlank(message = "El nombre es obligatorio")
        @Size(max = 100, message = "El nombre no debe exceder 100 caracteres")
        @Pattern(regexp = "^[a-zA-ZáéíóúÁÉÍÓÚñÑ ]+$", message = "El nombre solo puede contener letras y espacios")
        private String name;

        @NotNull(message = "El tipo de contrato es obligatorio")
        private ContractType contractType;

        @NotNull(message = "El salario bruto es obligatorio")
        @Positive(message = "El salario bruto debe ser positivo")
        private BigDecimal grossSalary;

        // constructor, getters, setters
    }

    // =============================================
    // 3. DTO — Response
    // =============================================
    static class FeatureResponse {
        private Long id;
        private String name;
        private ContractType contractType;
        private BigDecimal grossSalary;
        private LocalDateTime createdAt;
        private LocalDateTime updatedAt;

        FeatureResponse(Long id, String name, ContractType contractType,
                        BigDecimal grossSalary, LocalDateTime createdAt, LocalDateTime updatedAt) {
            this.id = id;
            this.name = name;
            this.contractType = contractType;
            this.grossSalary = grossSalary;
            this.createdAt = createdAt;
            this.updatedAt = updatedAt;
        }

        // getters
    }

    // =============================================
    // 4. REPOSITORY — Interface JPA
    // =============================================
    @Repository
    interface FeatureRepository extends JpaRepository<Feature, Long> {
        // Spring Data genera implementación automáticamente
    }

    // =============================================
    // 5. SERVICE — Lógica de negocio
    // =============================================
    @Service
    static class FeatureService {

        private final FeatureRepository repository;

        FeatureService(FeatureRepository repository) {
            this.repository = repository;
        }

        FeatureResponse create(FeatureRequest request) {
            Feature entity = new Feature();
            entity.name = request.name;
            entity.contractType = request.contractType;
            entity.grossSalary = request.grossSalary;

            Feature saved = repository.save(entity);
            return mapToResponse(saved);
        }

        FeatureResponse findById(Long id) {
            return repository.findById(id)
                .map(this::mapToResponse)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("Feature con id " + id + " no encontrado"));
        }

        List<FeatureResponse> findAll() {
            return repository.findAll().stream()
                .map(this::mapToResponse)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
        }

        private FeatureResponse mapToResponse(Feature entity) {
            return new FeatureResponse(
                entity.id,
                entity.name,
                entity.contractType,
                entity.grossSalary,
                entity.createdAt,
                entity.updatedAt
            );
        }
    }

    // =============================================
    // 6. CONTROLLER — REST
    // =============================================
    @RestController
    @RequestMapping("/api/v1/features")
    static class FeatureController {

        private final FeatureService service;

        FeatureController(FeatureService service) {
            this.service = service;
        }

        @PostMapping
        ResponseEntity<FeatureResponse> create(@Valid @RequestBody FeatureRequest request) {
            FeatureResponse response = service.create(request);
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.CREATED).body(response);
        }

        @GetMapping
        ResponseEntity<List<FeatureResponse>> findAll() {
            return ResponseEntity.ok(service.findAll());
        }

        @GetMapping("/{id}")
        ResponseEntity<FeatureResponse> findById(@PathVariable Long id) {
            return ResponseEntity.ok(service.findById(id));
        }
    }

    // =============================================
    // 7. EXCEPTION HANDLER — Global
    // =============================================
    static class ErrorResponse {
        private int code;
        private String message;
        private LocalDateTime timestamp;

        ErrorResponse(int code, String message, LocalDateTime timestamp) {
            this.code = code;
            this.message = message;
            this.timestamp = timestamp;
        }
    }

    @RestControllerAdvice
    static class GlobalExceptionHandler {

        @ExceptionHandler(RuntimeException.class)
        ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleNotFound(RuntimeException ex) {
            ErrorResponse error = new ErrorResponse(
                HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND.value(),
                ex.getMessage(),
                LocalDateTime.now()
            );
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND).body(error);
        }

        @ExceptionHandler(MethodArgumentNotValidException.class)
        ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleValidation(MethodArgumentNotValidException ex) {
            String message = ex.getBindingResult().getFieldErrors().stream()
                .map(e -> e.getField() + ": " + e.getDefaultMessage())
                .collect(Collectors.joining(", "));

            ErrorResponse error = new ErrorResponse(
                HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST.value(),
                message,
                LocalDateTime.now()
            );
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST).body(error);
        }
    }

    // =============================================
    // 8. INFRASTRUCTURE — RabbitMQ Producer
    // =============================================
    @Component
    static class FeatureEventProducer {

        private final RabbitTemplate rabbitTemplate;

        FeatureEventProducer(RabbitTemplate rabbitTemplate) {
            this.rabbitTemplate = rabbitTemplate;
        }

        void publishFeatureReady(Object event) {
            rabbitTemplate.convertAndSend("feature.exchange", "feature.ready", event);
        }
    }

    // =============================================
    // 9. INFRASTRUCTURE — RabbitMQ Consumer
    // =============================================
    @Component
    static class FeatureEventConsumer {

        private final FeatureService featureService;

        FeatureEventConsumer(FeatureService featureService) {
            this.featureService = featureService;
        }

        @RabbitListener(queues = "feature.process.queue")
        void handle(Object event) {
            // featureService.processFromEvent(event);
        }
    }

    // =============================================
    // ENUMS de referencia
    // =============================================
    enum ContractType {
        FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, CONTRACTOR
    }
}
